title: stelis soricina
intro: Stelis soricina, also known as the "Pitaya Blanca" or "White Dragon Fruit", is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and its extracts have been shown to have anti-cancer and antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
